Account Notice: Your account requires attention. Learn more on your Account Health Page.

Linux Camera Driver Engineer

Posted 2 days ago

Worldwide

Summary

Job Description: We are looking for an experienced embedded Linux CMOS sensor driver engineer to port two Onsemi CMOS image sensors (AR0820 and AR2020CSSM) onto the Arduino UNO Q or equivalent Linux-based development boards. 1. Core Goal (Phase 1): Port the CMOS sensors to achieve stable live image streaming and capture. (Please provide your proposed development plan and timeline in your proposal.) 2. Future Phases (Phase 2, TBD): Advanced ISP tuning and controls. 3. Compatible Target Platforms: Arduino UNO Q or equivalent platforms (including Aikri-22X/42X series SOM/DEK, QRB2210/QRB4210, and QCS2210/QCS4210 architectures). Hardware & Documentation Support Custom AR0820/AR2020 sensor boards and necessary interface cables can be provided as needed, with further hardware support available upon discussion. The standard Dev Kit can be shipped directly from our side or purchased by you (fully reimbursed) if required for development.

  • Less than 30 hrs/week
    Hourly
  • 1 to 3 months1-3 months
    Duration
  • Intermediate
    I am looking for a mix of experience and valueExperience Level
